summary: Built Module 3 NestJS Core API & CRUD logic, including link creation, listing, id retrieval, and /r/<code> redirects. Enforced security validation bounds to prevent exploitation.
evidence: Created links controller, service, and DTO modules in nest-api/src/links.
Created redirect controller at nest-api/src/redirect/redirect.controller.ts mapping to /r/:code.
Applied database schema via Prisma db push to PostgreSQL database on port 5432.
Started NestJS development server on port 3000.
Verified link creation via POST /links returns 201 Created and short_url/code.
Verified redirect via GET /r/:code returns 302 Found redirecting to target long URL.
Verified health check endpoint GET /health continues to return 200 OK.
Successfully validated and blocked case-insensitive schemes, relative URLs, userinfo formats, and backslash bypasses (all returning 400 Bad Request).
